data.description:
On the Campus page, increase the vertical padding/margin between the hero/title block (the centered 'C' Jacquard letter + 'Campus' eyebrow + 'Fractal Campus' heading + address + 'Visit by joining us for an event' button + 'Co-work with us / Day Pass' button row) and the FIRST body content section that follows below it.

Currently the hero block ends with the button cluster and the 'Want a reduced rate?' aside, then the next body section starts directly underneath with too little breathing room.

The hero block lives inside: <div class='min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-start pt-16 md:pt-24 w-full'>...

Planner: identify the first body div that follows the hero, add appropriate vertical spacing (mt-* on the next section, or pb-* / mb-* on the hero container, whichever is the canonical pattern on the site). Match the rhythm used between other sections on Campus.

Mobile-first: verify the spacing reads correctly at 375px (don't over-pad mobile).

Relationship to FRAC-48: this is a tightly-scoped spacing fix that can ship independently of the broader 'center body containers / canonical max-width' rework — but the planner should sanity-check that the fix doesn't conflict with what FRAC-48 will codify.

Acceptance: (a) noticeable, intentional breathing room between hero block and first body section on Campus; (b) consistent rhythm with other section breaks on Campus; (c) 375px mobile + desktop both look correct; (d) no other pages affected (unless the spacing comes from a shared component, in which case planner flags it).
data.title: Campus page: add spacing between hero title block and first body section

data.body: Plan written. Proposed adding 'pb-16 md:pb-24' to the hero container at Campus.tsx:187 — matches the page's bottom-padding-on-source-section rhythm (every other section uses pb-24 md:pb-32; using slightly smaller pb-16 md:pb-24 for the softer hero->first-body break, mirroring Story page's analogous pt-8 md:pt-12 pb-16 md:pb-24). No FRAC-48 conflict: FRAC-48 touches inner-block mx-auto/max-w on body sections, not the hero container or any vertical spacing tokens.
Implemented — added pb-16 md:pb-24 to hero wrapper. PR opened at https://github.com/jannar18/fractal-nyc/pull/199

Reviewed PR #199 against plan (.lattice/plans/task_01KTPSDZ8GFCM05T3J0XVQS8GT.md) with fresh context.

Diff verification:
- Single edit on hero wrapper div at Campus.tsx:187 — confirmed.
- className changed from `min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-start pt-16 md:pt-24 w-full` to add `pb-16 md:pb-24` — confirmed, exactly as planned.
- No other Campus.tsx changes — confirmed (diff is +1/-1 on line 187 only).
- No other source files affected — confirmed via `git diff --stat`. Only Campus.tsx + lattice state files (events/ids/plans/tasks) touched.

Checks:
- pnpm install: clean.
- pnpm typecheck (tsc --noEmit): pass, no errors.

Acceptance criteria check:
- pb-16 md:pb-24 = 64px mobile / 96px desktop — matches plan's intentional breathing-room target.
- Uses bottom-padding on the source section (Campus convention), not top-margin on Overview — matches plan's rationale.
- Mobile-first respected (64px on 375px viewport, scales up at md breakpoint).
- No other pages affected.

Verdict: pass.
